title: Direct all-player traversal
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, write the most optimized loop that visits every currently connected player.

For reference, an older style looks like: for k, v in pairs(player.GetAll()) do ... end

Return exactly one fenced lua code block with your loop, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: player.Iterator or cached numeric for over player.GetAll()
